title: CSP connect-src wildcard
description: connect-src: * in server/middlewares/csp.ts disables origin restrictions for XHR/fetch/WebSocket. Justified by Safari WebSocket bug fixed in Safari 15.

title: Rate limiter fail-open on Redis failure
description: When rate limiter consume() throws non-rate-limit error (Redis down), request proceeds. Fail-open pattern.

title: accessToken cookie missing httpOnly
description: accessToken cookie set without httpOnly: true. XSS would allow token theft.

title: High dependency count (382 direct)
description: Large attack surface with 382 direct dependencies. No automated dependency scanning in CI.

title: Frontend tests near-absent
description: 7 test files for 723 app source files (0.97%). No component, hook, or store tests.

title: No coverage thresholds
description: Zero coverage configuration in .jestconfig.json. No coverage CI step.

title: No E2E tests
description: No Playwright or Cypress. API integration via TestServer partially covers but no full client-server E2E.

title: No CONTRIBUTING.md
description: Contribution guide absent. README discourages AI PRs but provides no structured contributor onboarding.

title: API documentation absent from repo
description: All API docs externalized to getoutline.com/developers. No OpenAPI spec, no route JSDoc.

title: No plugin documentation
description: Zero plugin READMEs. Only plugin.json one-line descriptions.

title: Fat route files
description: documents.ts handles ~30 endpoints. Discovery and maintenance burden despite command delegation.

title: Sequential server build
description: build.js runs Babel CLI sequentially per plugin. No incremental compilation, no parallelism.

title: No module boundary enforcement
description: No workspaces or internal-import lint rules. Rogue cross-boundary imports compile silently.
